description_long: This coffee machine features a modern, compact design with a cylindrical base and a slightly angled upper section. The top compartment is a transparent hopper filled with coffee beans, capped with a black lid. Below the hopper, a metallic silver section houses a prominent round button, likely for operation. The lower front section contains a transparent chamber filled with ground coffee, suggesting an integrated grinder. The body is primarily black with smooth, rounded contours, and the materials appear to be a mix of plastic, metal, and glass. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek, compact coffee machine with a transparent bean hopper on top, a metallic control section, and a visible ground coffee chamber below. The design is modern with black, silver, and transparent elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent bean hopper, central button, and the ground coffee chamber below.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the layered structure and the clear separation between the bean hopper and ground coffee chamber.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the cylindrical shape and the alignment of the hopper and base, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the button and the transparent ground coffee chamber more prominently.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single round button is located on the sloped metallic section below the bean hopper; no other controls or labels are visible.
